zh.lifeSummary: 當Randall Grosvenor I於1455年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾貝拉阿波特時，他的父親Thomas Grosvenor-45歲，母親Isabelle (Peshale) Grosvenor41歲。他於大約1477年與Margaret Mainwaring結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1522年3月1日在他的家鄉享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾姆可萊斯同。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Randall Grosvenor I于1455年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾貝拉阿波特时，他的父亲Thomas Grosvenor-45岁，母亲Isabelle (Peshale) Grosvenor41岁。他于大约1477年与Margaret Mainwaring结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1522年3月1日在他的家乡享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾姆可萊斯同。

nameMeanings.name: Grosvenor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from French gros ‘big, great’ + veneur ‘hunter’.

History: This is the name of one of the wealthiest families in Britain, which holds the title Duke of Westminster. They have been long established in Cheshire, with strong links with the city of Chester. One of the earliest recorded bearers of the name was Robert le Grosvenor of Budworth, who was granted lands by the Earl of Chester in 1160. The family's fortunes were founded by Thomas Grosvenor (born 1656), who in 1677 married an heiress, Mary Davies, whose inheritance included Ebury Farm, Middlesex. This now forms an area of central London that includes Grosvenor Square and Belgrave Square.

variants.name: Gravenor
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French grand ‘big, tall’ + veneor ‘hunter’. Compare Grosvenor .

nameMeanings.name: Randall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mainly U.S.: medieval vernacular form of   Randolf .  This was in common use as a given name into the 17th century and gave rise to a surname. In modern use the given name is often a transferred use of this surname.

en.lifeSummary: When Randall Grosvenor I was born in 1455, in Bellaport, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Grosvenor, was -45 and his mother, Isabelle (Peshale) Grosvenor, was 41. He married Margaret Mainwaring about 1477. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 1 March 1522, in his hometown, at the age of 67, and was buried in Mucklestone, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Randall Grosvenor I est né en 1455, à Bellaport, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Grosvenor, avait -45 ans et sa mère, Isabelle (Peshale) Grosvenor, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Mainwaring environ 1477. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 1 mars 1522, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Mucklestone, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Randall Grosvenor I 1455 in Bellaport, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Grosvenor -45 und seine Mutter Isabelle (Peshale) Grosvenor 41. Er hat um 1477 Margaret Mainwaring geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 1. März 1522 im Alter von 67 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Mucklestone, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Randall Grosvenor I è nato il nel 1455 nel Bellaport, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Grosvenor, aveva -45 anni e il suo madre, Isabelle (Peshale) Grosvenor, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Mainwaring circa 1477. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 1 marzo 1522, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Mucklestone, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Randall Grosvenor Iが1455年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアベラポルトで生まれた時，父Thomas Grosvenorは-45歳，母Isabelle (Peshale) Grosvenorは41歳であった。約1477年にMargaret Mainwaringと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1522年3月1日に故郷で67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアムックレストーンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Randall Grosvenor I(이)가 1455년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 벨라포트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Grosvenor(은)는 -45세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabelle (Peshale) Grosvenor(은)는 41세였다. 그는 대략 1477년 Margaret Mainwaring(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1522년 3월 1일 그의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 무클레스톤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Randall Grosvenor I nasceu em 1455, em Bellaport, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Grosvenor, tinha -45 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle (Peshale) Grosvenor, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Mainwaring aproximadamente 1477. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de março de 1522, em sua cidade natal, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Mucklestone, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Randall Grosvenor I родился в 1455 г. в местности беллапорт, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Grosvenor было -45 год, а матери, которую звали Isabelle (Peshale) Grosvenor, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Mainwaring около 1477 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 1 марта 1522 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности мукклестоун, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Randall Grosvenor I nació en 1455, en Bellaport, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Grosvenor, tenía -45 años y su mamá, Isabelle (Peshale) Grosvenor, tenía 41 años. Murió el 1 de marzo de 1522, en su pueblo, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Mucklestone, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
